surface_verification.justification: Static client-only render change to the create dialogs (FR-01.16 New-* modal / FR-01.08 leadwright fields): the below-Description metadata fields, schema params and command preview are wrapped in a collapsed-by-default gray MoreOptionsDisclosure; required params stay outside it. No API route, store mutation, WS/SSE handler or message contract changed (server untouched). Verified by 1819 passing client unit tests (collapsed-by-default + expand across New Task/Iterate/Pipeline/custom bodies, required-stays-visible, reset-to-collapsed on reopen, auto-expand-on-prefill, unchanged submit payloads) PLUS a manual real-browser Playwright smoke (Vite 5174 -> Hono 3848 against real ~/.claude projects): New Task modal opened collapsed (command-preview absent, aria-expanded=false), clicking 'More options' revealed the fields + command preview (aria-expanded=true); collapsed + expanded screenshots captured.

behaviors.behavior: Below-Description area (leadwright, schema params, command preview) is collapsed by default in New Task/Iterate/Pipeline/custom-project dialogs
behaviors.evidence: MoreOptionsDisclosure.test.tsx + NewIterateModal/NewPipelineModal/NewGenericModal/NewTaskModal.test.tsx assert command-preview/content absent by default PASSED

behaviors.behavior: Section expands on toggle click, mounting the fields + command preview
behaviors.evidence: MoreOptionsDisclosure.test.tsx 'reveals children when open' + integration open-then-assert tests PASSED

behaviors.behavior: Required params render OUTSIDE the collapsed section (Launch never blocked by a hidden field)
behaviors.evidence: NewTaskModal.test.tsx 'required field visible without opening Advanced or More options (P2)' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: Section resets to collapsed on modal reopen
behaviors.evidence: NewIssueModal.test.tsx 'close + reopen wipes ... leadwright state' (reopens collapsed) PASSED

behaviors.behavior: Section auto-expands when opened pre-seeded with priority/domain (triage Fix now)
behaviors.evidence: NewTaskModal.test.tsx 'More options auto-expands when opened pre-seeded with priority/domain' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: Submit payloads (leadwright + params) unchanged after the wrap
behaviors.evidence: payload-create.test.tsx 'Save with leadwright fields ...' (open section then submit) + payload-launch.test.tsx PASSED

behaviors.behavior: Plain Claude dialog is unaffected (no below-Description area, no disclosure rendered)
